text:
There was once a quiet girl named Olive who loved to read fairy tales. One evening she heard a peculiar song under the moonlight. Intrigued, she followed it. Suddenly she stumbled upon a old oak.

A wise owl greeted her.

"Seek wisdom," said the owl.

Olive studied old woodcuts. She learned legends.

"The gentle tortoise wins."

Olive fell asleep under an oak. Dreams turned to golden turtles.

She woke singing. Days passed.

A king found her singing. He heard tales.

"You're Olive!" he exclaimed.

They lived happily ever after under an oak.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
